summary.para: Immediately create a snapshot according to the snapshot lifecycle policy without waiting for the scheduled time. The snapshot policy is normally applied according to its schedule, but you might want to manually run a policy before performing an upgrade or other maintenance.
The period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
The id of the snapshot lifecycle policy to be executed
The period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
